Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: tables by form [300039928], tables (support furniture) [300039548], support furniture [300039337], furniture by form or function [300048628], furniture [300037680], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Tables whose tops are hinged to tilt to a vertical position.
Mesas cuyas tapas se abisagran para inclinarse en una posición vertical.
Driepotige tafels, veelal met een rond, scharnierend tafelblad dat tot een verticale positie gekanteld kan worden.
桌面可傾斜至直立狀的桌子。

Term_Source.Page: Kevin Stayton, Curator, Decorative Arts, Brooklyn Museum, 1/96

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
